title: KOOLABURRA BY UGG PARTNERS WITH SOLES4SOULS THIS HOLIDAY SEASON TO BRING SHOES TO CHILDREN WITHOUT SHELTER
text: STARTING GIVING TUESDAY, $10 FROM EACH PAIR OF THE WOMEN'S KOOLA SHORT SOLD ON KOOLABURRA.COM THROUGH DECEMBER 31 st WILL GO TO SOLES4SOULS SANTA BARBARA, Calif. , Nov. 29, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- This holiday season, Southern California-based lifestyle brand Koolaburra® by UGG®  (a division of Deckers Brands [NYSE: DECK]) is working to ensure every kid experiences the confidence and comfort of stepping into a new pair of shoes through a philanthropic product giveback supporting Soles4Souls; the global organization that turns shoes and clothing into educational and economic opportunities.

title: UGG parent Deckers Outdoor named 'clearest winner of Black Friday week' by Wedbush footwear and apparel team
text: Deckers Outdoor Corp. DECK, +0.63% , parent of the UGG shoe brand, was named clearest winner of Black Friday week by the footwear and apparel team at Wedbush on Monday, with analyst Tom Nikic citing several positive reads for the brand that promise a very strong holiday season. That's a positive for UGG, which generates about half its annual revenue in the fourth quarter, Nikic wrote in a note to clients.

title: Deckers Brands Recognized on Investor's Business Daily's List of 100 Best ESG Companies for 2022
text: GOLETA, Calif. , Nov. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Deckers Brands (NYSE:DECK), a global leader in designing, marketing, and distributing innovative footwear, apparel and accessories has been selected by Investor's Business Daily® (IBD) as one of the 100 Best ESG Companies for 2022.

title: UGG SPREADS THE LOVE THIS HOLIDAY SEASON WITH A FESTIVE 'FEELS LIKE UGG' CAMPAIGN & DONATION TO MENTAL HEALTH ORGANIZATIONS
text: BRAND'S HOLIDAY INITIATIVES HIGHLIGHTS THE STRENGTH OF CREATING & CULTIVATING COMMUNITIES HI-RES CONTENT Campaign & product photography credit: UGG® SANTA BARBARA, Calif. , Nov. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Southern California-based global lifestyle brand UGG®  (a division of Deckers Brands [NYSE: DECK]) celebrates its position as the ultimate gift-giving brand by unveiling Feels Like UGG, its global holiday campaign featuring multi-hyphenate creative Jorge "Gitoo" Wright, a star on the cutting edge of the New York City fashion club culture scene known for bringing together all types of people to celebrate the pursuit of well-being, much like UGG®.

title: Deckers Releases its FY22 Creating Change Report
text: GOLETA, Calif. , Nov. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), a global leader in ­­designing, marketing, and distributing innovative footwear, apparel and accessories, today released its Fiscal Year 2022 Corporate Responsibility and Sustainability Report, Creating Change.

title: Jim Cramer picks 4 apparel stocks that are 'worth owning' when the market's oversold
text: Retail stocks have been hit hard this year as inventory gluts forced companies to offload products at discounted prices.

title: Better Buy: Nike vs. Deckers Outdoor
text: The numbers say Deckers has more going for it.

title: Deckers stock wins a ‘buy' rating from the Bank of America
text: Deckers Outdoor Corp (NYSE: DECK) is in focus on Tuesday after a Bank of America analyst announced a “buy” rating on the footwear company. Deckers stock should be worth $425 That's an interesting call considering the Goleta-headquartered firm is already up about 60% versus its year-to-date low.
